title: Locally Weighted Regression (LWR) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of making a prediction for a query point using Locally Weighted Regression, highlighting the role of the weighting kernel.
relationships: Query point is used to calculate weights for all training points
Weights determine the influence of each training point
A weighted least squares model is fit to the local region
The fitted local model makes the final prediction for the query point
